Japan|Empire of Japan]] from 1910 to 1945 |image=[[File:Goshichi no kiri.svg|80px|link=|alt=|Seal of the Government-General of Korea]] |listclass=hlist |state={{{state<includeonly>|collapsed</includeonly>}}} |group1=Government |list1= * [[:en:Governor-General of Chōsen|Governor-General of Chōsen]] ([[:en:List of Japanese governors-general of Korea|list]]) * [[:en:Japanese Korean Army|Japanese Korean Army]] |group2=Cultural policies |list2= * [[:en:Chōsen Art Exhibition|Chōsen Art Exhibition]] (1922–1944) * [[:en:Chosun Exhibition|Chosun Exhibition]] (1929) * [[:en:Colored Clothes Campaign|Colored Clothes Campaign]] (1920–1945) * [[:en:Office of the Yi Dynasty|Office of the Yi Dynasty]] * [[:en:Sōshi-kaimei|Sōshi-kaimei]] (1939–1945) * [[:en:Shinto in Korea|Shinto in Korea]] ** [[:en:State Shinto|State Shinto]] |group3=Economy |list3= * [[:en:Bank of Chōsen|Bank of Chōsen]] * [[:en:Hwacheon Dam|Hwacheon Dam]] * [[:en:Korean yen|Korean yen]] * [[:en:Sup'ung Dam|Sup'ung Dam]] {{Navbox|subgroup | group1 = Companies | list1 = <!--Only include if they are very significant--> * [[:en:Chōsen Anthracite Company|Chōsen Anthracite Company]] * [[:en:Chōsen Government Railway|Chōsen Government Railway]] * [[:en:Chosen Railway|Chosen Railway]] * [[:en:Oriental Development Company|Oriental Development Company]] }} |group4=Controversies |list4= * [[:en:Comfort women|Comfort women]] ([[List of former comfort women#Korea|list]]) * [[:en:Sakhalin Koreans|Sakhalin Koreans]] {{Navbox|subgroup | group1 = Forced labor | list1 = * [[:en:Aso Mining forced labor controversy|Aso Mining forced labor controversy]] * [[:en:Hashima Island|Hashima Island]] * [[:en:Korean Women's Volunteer Labour Corps|Korean Women's Volunteer Labour Corps]] * [[Sado Island]] * [[Slavery in Japan#World War II|Slavery during World War II]] * [[:en:Utoro, Uji|Utoro, Uji]] | group2 = Events | list2 = * [[:en:105-Man Incident|105-Man Incident]] (1911) * [[:en:March First Movement|March First Movement]] (1919) * [[:en:Jeamri Massacre|Jeamri Massacre]] (1919) * [[:en:Battle of Fengwudong|Battle of Fengwudong]] (1920) ** [[:en:Battle of Samdunja|Battle of Samdunja]] * [[:en:Battle of Qingshanli|Battle of Qingshanli]] (1920) * [[:en:Gando Massacre|Gando Massacre]] (1920–1921) * [[:en:Shinano River incident|Shinano River incident]] (1922) * [[:en:Kantō Massacre|Kantō Massacre]] (1923) * [[:en:June Tenth Movement|June Tenth Movement]] (1926) * [[:en:Gwangju Student Independence Movement|Gwangju Student Independence Movement]] (1929) * [[:en:Hongkou Park Incident|Hongkou Park Incident]] (1932) * [[:en:Battle of Pochonbo|Battle of Pochonbo]] (1937) * [[:en:Korean Language Society Incident|Korean Language Society Incident]] (1942) | group3 = {{colored link|black|Chinilpa|Collaborators}} <!--Only include individuals who are extremely notable and are widely and explicitly described as collaborators--> | list3 = * [[:en:Five Eulsa Traitors|Five Eulsa Traitors]] * [[:en:Hong Sa-ik|Hong Sa-ik]] * [[:en:Iljinhoe|Iljinhoe]] * [[:en:Korean History Compilation Committee|Korean History Compilation Committee]] * [[:en:Park Yeong-hyo|Park Yeong-hyo]] * [[:en:Refrain Club|Refrain Club]] ** [[:en:Park Jung-yang|Park Jung-yang]] * [[Song Byeong-jun]] * [[:en:Yi Yun-yong (general)|Yi Yun-yong]] | group4 = {{colored link|black|Korean independence movement|Independence movement}} | list4 = * [[:en:Korean Declaration of Independence|Declaration of Independence]] * [[:en:Independence Club|Independence Club]] * [[:en:Korean National Association|Korean National Association]] * [[List_of_militant_Korean_independence_activist_organizations|List of militant independence organizations]] * [[:en:List of Korean independence activists|List of independence activists]] * [[:en:Provisional Government of the Republic of Korea|Provisional Government]] }} |group5 = Places and structures |list5 = * disputes|Japan–Korea disputes]] * [[:en:Japan–North Korea relations|Japan–North Korea relations]] * [[:en:Japan–South Korea relations|Japan–South Korea relations]] * [[:en:Japanese history textbook controversies|Japanese history textbook controversies]] * [[:en:List of war apology statements issued by Japan|List of war apology statements issued by Japan]] * [[:en:Division of Korea|Division of Korea]] (1945–) * [[:en:Koreans in Japan|Koreans in Japan]] (1945–) * [[:en:Hibakusha|Hibakusha]] (1945–) * [[:en:Treaty of San Francisco|Treaty of San Francisco]] (1952) * [[:en:Treaty on Basic Relations Between Japan and the Republic of Korea|Treaty on Basic Relations Between Japan and the Republic of Korea]] (1965) * [[:en:Independence Hall of Korea|Independence Hall of Korea]] (1987–) * [[:en:Murayama Statement|Murayama Statement]] (1995) * [[:en:Special Law to Redeem Pro-Japanese Collaborators' Property|Special Law to Redeem Pro-Japanese Collaborators' Property]] (2005) * [[:en:Museum of Japanese Colonial History in Korea|Museum of Japanese Colonial History in Korea]] (2018–) {{Navbox|subgroup |group1 = {{colored link|black|Comfort women}} |list1 = * [[:en:Futsukaichi Rest Home|Futsukaichi Rest Home]] (1946–1947) * [[:en:The Korean Council for the Women Drafted for Military Sexual Slavery by Japan|The Korean Council for the Women Drafted for Military Sexual Slavery by Japan]] (1990–) * [[:en:Wednesday demonstration|Wednesday demonstration]] (1992–) * [[:en:Kono Statement|Kono Statement]] (1993) * [[:en:Asian Women's Fund|Asian Women's Fund]] (1994) * [[:en:1998 Shimonoseki Trial|Shimonoseki Trial]] (1998) * [[:en:Women's International War Crimes Tribunal on Japan's Military Sexual Slavery|Women's International War Crimes Tribunal on Japan's Military Sexual Slavery]] (2000) * [[:en:United States House of Representatives House Resolution 121|United States House of Representatives House Resolution 121]] (2007) * [[:en:Japan–South Korea Comfort Women Agreement|Japan–South Korea Comfort Women Agreement]] (2015) }} }} <noinclude> {{collapsible option}}
